title: Multiple style options for the connect boards
excerpt: We had a version of a connect board column created for our account but unfortunately it only does a one way link. We like the look and style of this one better and would like it to be a permanent choice to have a connect…

posts.author: rbeckwith (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml: We had a version of a connect board column created for our account but unfortunately it only does a one way link. We like the look and style of this one better and would like it to be a permanent choice to have a connect board column styled this way.
